title: Protocols for Agarose Preparation Using Denville LE Agarose
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"54j1r","text":"Denville LE Agarose is an all purpose agarose for routine nucleic acid electrophoresis of fragments between 500bp-23,000 bp.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4tss6","text":"Denville LE Agarose has no detectable DNase or RNase activity.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fk6vj","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1m3v5","text":"Please refer to the appropriate protocol below, depending on whether you are using a hot plate or a microwave.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Nicole Clouse
